name: ai_prices
title: AI Model Prices
description: Per-model provider pricing for AI chat cost recording. Editable live like any other record -- object_ai never hardcodes a price table, so a stale entry here is a data-entry fix, not a code change.

fields.name: input_per_million_cents
fields.label: Input cents / 1M tokens
fields.help: Integer cents only -- never a float for money

fields.name: output_per_million_cents
fields.label: Output cents / 1M tokens
fields.help: Integer cents only -- never a float for money

fields.name: effective_date
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: When this price took effect; lookups use the most recent row for a (provider, model) pair
